unit: W2 — bin/griot init verb (CONVENTIONS + registry + body + dispatch)

contract.goal: Land bin/griot init as a new substrate verb that scaffolds learnings/ subdirs + amends consumer-repo .gitignore. Contract-first sub-step ordering per PLAN W2: amendments (2a + 2b) and registry row (2c) land in the same commit before the verb body (2d) and dispatch (2e), so the parallel-work-invariant tripwire fires against the new entry from the moment the body lands. Resolves OQ5.
acceptance_criteria: CONVENTIONS.md amendments: § Declared exceptions gains gitignore-amendment bullet; new § Category 4 generated-from-upstream section added with sync-shared as the example.

cli/parallel-work-invariant.test.ts: Category union extended (+generated-from-upstream), Exception union extended (+gitignore-amendment), VALID_CATEGORIES + DECLARED_EXCEPTIONS sets updated, new griot init REGISTRY row (category=single-writer-serialized, target=<project-root>/.gitignore, exception=gitignore-amendment).

cli/verbs/griot/init.ts: verb body — idempotent, creates learnings/{session-notes,nightly}/, appends learnings/ to .gitignore if absent. Edge cases handled: file-missing → create; file-without-trailing-newline → separator inserted; trimmed-line match for trailing whitespace; deeper learnings/foo NOT matched as present.
cli/verbs/griot/init.test.ts: 13 tests across 4 describe blocks (fresh root, idempotency, existing .gitignore edge cases, pre-existing learnings tree). makeProjectRoot factory used; parallel-safe.
cli/verbs/griot/_test-factory.ts: makeProjectRoot helper — mkdtempSync + rmSync cleanup. No process.chdir.
rules_applied: Contract-first ordering per PLAN W2: amendments + registry row + body + dispatch land in one commit (the conceptual unit) but the registry row's tripwire-vs-conventions invariants would fire if the amendments were missing — so the order within the commit is amendments-first.
Idempotency invariant per Category 3: second run is no-op (verb returns 'unchanged' for .gitignore; mkdirSync recursive is naturally idempotent for the tree).
Parallel-safe tests: factory uses mkdtempSync per call; no process.chdir; ctx.cwd is passed explicitly to the verb.
Verb signature mirrors existing griot verbs: (rest, ctx) => DispatchResult.
disqualifiers: No refactor of existing griot ctx.cwd resolution (W3).
No sync-shared implementation (W7 — the Category 4 row is reserved for it).
No top-level learnings/ changes in THIS repo (verb operates on ctx.cwd; tests use tmpdir).
inputs: projects/2026-05-19-marketplace-portable-install/PLAN.md (§ Phases W2 sub-steps, § OQ5 init behavior, § Decisions)
cli/verbs/griot/capture.test.ts (existing mkdtempSync inline pattern — lifted into makeProjectRoot factory)

actions: Amended projects/CONVENTIONS.md: added gitignore-amendment to § Declared exceptions (idempotent .gitignore writes to <project-root>/.gitignore); added new § Category 4 generated-from-upstream (sync-shared example; deterministically-derived multi-file output).

Extended cli/parallel-work-invariant.test.ts: Category union += 'generated-from-upstream'; Exception union += 'gitignore-amendment'; VALID_CATEGORIES + DECLARED_EXCEPTIONS sets updated; new griot init row inserted after the existing guild whiteboard append row.
Created cli/verbs/griot/_test-factory.ts: makeProjectRoot helper returning {root, cleanup}; uses mkdtempSync + rmSync; no chdir.

Created cli/verbs/griot/init.ts: ensureLearningsTree creates learnings/{session-notes,nightly}/; amendGitignore handles create / append / unchanged paths with trimmed-line matching and trailing-newline preservation; renderStdout produces a structured one-line summary; initVerb signature mirrors existing griot verbs.

Created cli/verbs/griot/init.test.ts: 13 tests covering fresh-root scaffolding, idempotency (file content unchanged on second run), 5 .gitignore edge cases (append-when-missing-line, insert-separator-when-no-trailing-newline, no-op-when-present, deeper-path-not-matched, trailing-whitespace-tolerated), and 3 pre-existing-tree cases (preserve captured content, skip already-present subdirs, report the subset created).
Wired dispatch in cli/verbs/griot/index.ts: import initVerb + 'init: initVerb' entry in GRIOT_VERBS.

Iteration: first run had 1 test failure (assertion regex mismatch on .gitignore-unchanged stdout — actual output 'no changes (unchanged)' didn't match `/\.gitignore unchanged/`). Fixed by dropping the redundant stdout-format assertion from the no-op idempotency test (the next test explicitly covers the format). Also dropped an unused LEARNINGS_LINE constant the lint diagnostic flagged. Re-ran: 13/13 green.
npx vitest run cli/verbs/griot/init.test.ts cli/parallel-work-invariant.test.ts → 20/20 passed (13 init + 7 invariant).
npm test (full suite) → 539/539 passed (was 526; +13 from W2).

Invoked /guild-validate with manual panel (evaluator-contract-fit + evaluator-test-unit + evaluator-naming per agents/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md mapping) — derive-panel still fallback per W1 substrate-path bug. All three returned approved. One advisory from evaluator-naming: InitAction → InitResult (the type describes the verb's return shape, not a redux-style event).
Applied the naming advisory as free polish: renamed InitAction → InitResult throughout cli/verbs/griot/init.ts. Re-ran tests: 539/539 still green.

scope: cli/parallel-work-invariant.test.ts (Category union, Exception union, REGISTRY, sets)
changes_since_previous: W1 (ab4e9dd) landed marketplace skeleton + V9 test. W2 adds the first new CLI verb — griot init — plus the contract-first substrate amendments (new Category 4 reserved for W7's sync-shared; new gitignore-amendment exception for this verb). The makeProjectRoot test factory is shared substrate for griot verb tests going forward; W3 likely lifts more onto it.
notes_for_pr: OQ5 resolved: griot init creates both learnings/session-notes/ and learnings/nightly/ subdirs. session-notes is the active write target for griot capture; nightly is named in use.ts's tier-separation prose as a path the LLM must NOT read at session time. Creating both at init makes the on-disk shape self-documenting and means downstream verbs (capture) never have to mkdir on the active path.

New Category 4 (generated-from-upstream) introduced in CONVENTIONS.md and the parallel-work-invariant Category type to reserve the category for W7's sync-shared. The registry doesn't have a Category 4 row yet — that lands when W7 ships sync-shared.

gitignore-amendment declared exception added. The .gitignore matching logic is intentionally lenient: trimmed-line equality so `learnings/` and `learnings/   ` are treated as equivalent; deeper paths like `learnings/foo` correctly NOT matched as present.

makeProjectRoot test factory landed at cli/verbs/griot/_test-factory.ts. Lifts the inline mkdtempSync pattern from capture.test.ts. Parallel-safe — each test gets a unique tmpdir; no process.chdir. W3 likely refactors the rest of cli/verbs/griot/*.test.ts onto this factory once the project-root resolver lands.

Substrate-path bug (W1 surfacing) still active: bin/guild derive-panel reads from .claude/agents/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md but file lives at agents/PANEL-COMPOSITION.md. Manual panel composition continues. Fix likely lands alongside W4 skill-body work or substrate cleanup.
InitAction → InitResult: applied evaluator-naming's advisory as inline polish. Module-internal type rename only; no public surface affected.
